name: Voluntary Election of Critical Status

eligibility.description: Multiemployer plans not yet in critical status but projected by an actuary to enter it within the next 5 plan years.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a plan sponsor to elect to be in critical status early if projected to be so within 5 years, enabling the use of rehabilitation tools and benefit adjustments to manage funding liabilities.
